    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T U W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    P

    Paintable - Interface in brush
    The core interface for all brushes and painting tools in WigglyPaint.
    paintOnEveryLayer(CanvasData, double, double, double) - Method in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Paints the brush stroke on every wiggle layer.
    paintOnEveryLayer(CanvasData, double, double, double) - Method in class brush.FountainBrush
    Fountain brush draws smooth, continuous strokes across layers.
    paintOnEveryLayer(CanvasData, double, double, double) - Method in class brush.HighlightBrush
    Highlight strokes are continuous and smooth.
    paintOnEveryLayer(CanvasData, double, double, double) - Method in interface brush.Paintable
    Called continuously during a drag/move event.
    paintOnEveryLayer(CanvasData, double, double, double) - Method in class brush.PencilBrush
    Pencil brush uses the default continuous stroke behavior provided by AbstractBrush.paintOnEveryLayer(CanvasData, double, double, double).
    PencilBrush - Class in brush
    A simple pencil-style brush.
    PencilBrush(int) - Constructor for class brush.PencilBrush
    Creates a pencil brush with a given base size.
    pencilIcon - Variable in class gui.BrushPane
     
    primary - Variable in class utils.themes.Theme
    Primary accent color.
    PRIMARY - Static variable in class canvas.CanvasData
    Primary accent color for brush variations.
